summary: Implemented bounded frontend snapshot_ready recovery so backend payload.snapshot events replace stale preview data safely without changing backend code.
tasks_completed: Updated applyLiveEvent to apply valid snapshot_ready payload.snapshot data as the replacement PreviewData while preserving loadedAt.
Kept snapshot_ready cursor and connection state current, including lastEventId, live status, reset reconnect attempt, and cleared stale connection errors through the existing event connection path.
Added a focused frontend test covering snapshot_ready recovery replacement behavior.
